coachAM: Your current output is collapsing because your mornings, the very foundation of your discipline and clarity, are being consistently derailed by a lack of sleep and physical readiness, directly impacting your ability to execute against the "lock in young with a clear" vision you journaled. This pattern of inconsistent physical and mental preparation is the root cause of your fragmented execution and the absence of perfect days, signaling a critical vulnerability in your capacity to sustain elite-level performance and capitalize on the "powerful and kind network" and "Salesforce Interview" opportunities you're grateful for.
